_comment: Schema fields with no INSERT/UPDATE write path. Each entry MUST have reason + resolves_when. When the resolving milestone lands, remove from this allowlist.

knowledge.delete_reason.reason: Soft-delete metadata; Sub 1 maintenance lane (ADR-0004) will write it

resolves_when.ref: Sub 1 MaintenanceProposeTask delete_knowledge path implemented

question.rubric_json.reason: Sub 1 JudgeTask grading config; not yet written by ingestion

resolves_when.ref: Sub 1 JudgeTask + question authoring path implemented

question.judge_kind_override.reason: Sub 1 per-question judge override; not yet written

resolves_when.ref: Sub 1 JudgeTask implemented

question.source_ref.reason: Provenance ref unused; ADR-0006 v2 后 event.payload.source 替代

resolves_when.ref: Phase 1c.1 落地，决定 keep or drop

question.created_by.reason: Provenance for AI-generated questions; ADR-0006 v2 will fill via event(action='generate', subject_kind='question')

resolves_when.ref: Phase 1c.1 event generation path implemented
Phase 1c.1 落地，决定 keep or drop

learning_item.primary_artifact_id.reason: ADR-0027 (YUK-203 P1) — primary_artifact_id 现为 learning_item→note 的可空 representative 引用指针（INSERT via acceptLearningIntent；无 UPDATE re-point path）。ADR-0004 的双向 ownership 已被 supersede。

resolves_when.ref: ADR-0027 reference-model: 当 learning_item→note 读全量切到 label 交集 (notesForItem, P1-PR2/P4) 后评估 drop 此列

learning_item.child_learning_item_ids.reason: Denormalised counterpart to parent_learning_item_id; children are derived via SELECT WHERE parent_learning_item_id=X. Keep the column for forward-compat (Phase 2 may activate it for ordering) but no write path planned.

resolves_when.ref: Phase 2 — if/when ordered child arrays become a UX need; otherwise drop

learning_item.reviewed_at.reason: Sub 0d learning lane review timestamp; not yet written

resolves_when.ref: Sub 0d Phase 1 (review_event handler) implemented

answer.vision_extracted.reason: U5 (YUK-203) revives `answer` as the paper draft layer with text+choice input; vision_extracted holds OCR text for the scratch-image answer path whose CAPTURE UI is explicitly DEFER in U5 (plan §1 non-goals — data model must not block image upload, but MVP ships text+choice only). Write path lands with the scratch-image answer-capture UI.

resolves_when.ref: scratch-image answer-capture UI implemented (CO §5.7 image input)

echo_jobs.error_md.reason: Sub 0c golden E2E hard-fail path not implemented; echo handler only writes success path. error_md reserved for explicit failure scenarios test

resolves_when.ref: Sub 0c echo hard-fail E2E test added OR field dropped

echo_jobs.input.reason: YUK-166 surfaced: the echo job ROW is enqueued from the golden-E2E test harness (no src/ INSERT of echo_jobs); the echo handler only UPDATEs output/status, never input. The old file-level lint falsely counted input as written because the handler's writeJobEvent payload `{ input, output }` shares the column name across tables — exactly the cross-table masking YUK-166 fixes. No src/ write path exists for echo_jobs.input.

resolves_when.ref: Sub 0c echo enqueue path moved into src/ OR field dropped

_comment_phase1c1_lane_a: Phase 1c.1 Lane A added 4 new tables (event, learning_session, material_fsrs_state, knowledge_edge). Their write paths land in Lane B (Zod schemas in src/core/schema/event/**) and main-lane Step 4-6 (server read-path rewrite + /api/events + edges CRUD). Lane A only declares schema; write paths must follow.

_comment_b1_w1_soft_track: B1-W1 (ADR-0035) soft-track columns. n=1 (single learner) makes the cohort-structured IRT/CDM/KT parameters STRUCTURALLY non-estimable — this is a ceiling of the single-learner regime (Stocking 1990 / B1 foundation §6.3), NOT a 'write path not built yet' gap. They NEVER feed p(L)/scheduling (ADR-0035 决定 #4). kind:'manual' because the Wave 2 phase is not yet named in docs/superpowers/status.md (a kind:'phase' entry would fail the phase-match check). NOTE (YUK-348): item_calibration.kt_json is NO LONGER allowlisted — it now has an UPDATE write path via src/server/mastery/kt-calibration.ts applyKtEstimate (BKT forward sink, prior-echo at n=1), so audit:schema sees it as update-only (non-stub). It remains a PURE PERSISTENCE SINK with ZERO downstream consumer — having a write path does NOT soften 决定 #4. The other 5 columns (irt_a/irt_c/cdm_json + the 2 mastery_state columns) stay NULL + allowlisted.

item_calibration.irt_a.reason: 软轨区分度：n=1 无 cohort 结构性不可估（Stocking 1990）。慢热 firm-up 有天花板，置信上限受 n=1 约束、非纯时间问题（B1 foundation §6.3）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

item_calibration.irt_c.reason: 软轨猜测下限：同 irt_a，n=1 结构性不可估

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

item_calibration.cdm_json.reason: 软轨 CDM slip/guess 画像：CDM 估计器 n=1 原样回吐先验，钉软轨不进 p(L)/调度（ADR-0035）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

mastery_state.calibration_residual.reason: fixed-anchor 慢热残差：Wave2 复盘/锚校准路径才写。残差精度继承锚质量，n=1 受结构性约束（B1 foundation）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 fixed-anchor 残差路径

mastery_state.fluency_illusion_flag.reason: 流畅度幻觉旗：A2 复盘判定才置位（Wave2）。本 wave 无复盘触发路径

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 A2 复盘判定

mastery_state.theta_grid_json.reason: A4 (YUK-436) 离散网格贝叶斯 θ_KC offset 后验 — inc-1 是 PURE-ADDITIVE SHADOW：写路径已存在（THETA_GRID_ENABLED=true 且单 KC 题时由 updateThetaForAttempt 尾部 shadow-write）。inc-2 读侧已接线（candidate-signals.ts → klpScoreFromGrid 选题），但**仍 flag-gated dark-ship**（THETA_GRID_ENABLED 默认 false → 选题永不读它，theta_hat 仍是 SoT，选题评分逐位等同今天）。故**尚无 LIVE reader**——真正的 grid→SoT cut-over = 校准验证（audit:calibration verdict）后翻 THETA_GRID_ENABLED，那时本 entry 解除。写侧 + 读侧（flag-OFF byte-identical + flag-ON klp_grid）双向均有单测守（state.db.test.ts + candidate-signals.db.test.ts）。

resolves_when.ref: A4 inc-2 grid→SoT cut-over (YUK-436)

_comment_yuk454_inc1_misconception: YUK-454 increment-1 (ADR-0036 身份层) — the DORMANT misconception identity-table skeleton. No writer exists in L1: no route/job/copilotTool/manifest wiring. The write path is gated behind the ADR-0034 consistency gate (promotion flow, YUK-454 axis-2/gated lane). The business columns below have NO INSERT/UPDATE write path until that slice lands; the trivial columns (id/created_at/updated_at/archived_at) need no entry.

resolves_when.ref: ADR-0034 consistency gate + promotion flow (YUK-454 axis-2/gated lane)
